steps.title: Incubate Overnight at 37°C with 5% CO2
steps.instruction: Incubate Overnight at 37°C with 5% CO2.

steps.title: Mix DNA solution and X-tremeGENE solution...
steps.instruction: Mix DNA solution and X-tremeGENE solution and incubate at room temp for 00:15:00 .

steps.title: Add 60 ul of X-tremeGENE to...
steps.instruction: Add 60 ul of X-tremeGENE to 1ml of OptiMEM, for each flask.

steps.title: Prepare DNA tubes
steps.instruction: Prepare DNA tubes: 10.5 ug of your plasmid 3.5 ug of VSVG plasmid 7.0 ug of dR8.91 plasmid 1 ml OptiMEM

steps.title: Plate HEK293T cells in appropriate culture vessels (e
steps.instruction: Plate HEK293T cells in appropriate culture vessels (e.g., T75 flask) to achieve 70-80% confluency on the day of transfection.

steps.title: Use a 5ml pipet to add...
steps.instruction: Use a 5ml pipet to add transfection mixture dropwise to flask and gently swirl flask to mix.

steps.title: Spin down collected media for 10...
steps.instruction: Spin down collected media for 10 min at 1100 rpm to pellet any dead cells/debris.

steps.title: Add 12 ml of AGM to...
steps.instruction: Add 12 ml of AGM to flask and put back in the incubator.

steps.title: Collect media from flask in a 15 ml tube
steps.instruction: Collect media from flask in a 15 ml tube.

steps.title: Aspirate media from flask
steps.instruction: Aspirate media from flask.

steps.title: Replace with 12 ml of Astrocyte Growth Media (AGM)
steps.instruction: Replace with 12 ml of Astrocyte Growth Media (AGM).

steps.title: Test for presence of viral particles using Lenti-X GoStick (Clonetech)
steps.instruction: Test for presence of viral particles using Lenti-X GoStick (Clonetech). Add 20 ul of media to the stick and then add 4 drops of chase solution. The control band will appear right away, and within 5-10 min you should see a faint second band appear if there is virus present.

steps.title: Aliquot lentivirus and store at -80°C for future use
steps.instruction: Aliquot lentivirus and store at -80°C for future use.

steps.title: Filter collected media through a 0
steps.instruction: Filter collected media through a 0.45 μm syringe filter.

steps.title: Collect media from flask in a 15 ml tube
steps.instruction: Collect media from flask in a 15 ml tube.

steps.title: Spin down, filter and aliquot media...
steps.instruction: Spin down, filter and aliquot media as described in previous section. Don’t need to test with a Lenti-X GoStick this time.

steps.title: Add bleach solution to flask to...
steps.instruction: Add bleach solution to flask to kill remaining viral particles, aspirate, and discard flask.

steps.title: Get a bucket of ice and...
steps.instruction: Get a bucket of ice and get lentivirus aliquot from -80°C.

steps.title: After two days (astrocytes are DIV12),...
steps.instruction: After two days (astrocytes are DIV12), repeat puromycin feeding by feeding with AGM + puromycin at 2ug/mL.

steps.title: Remove 1 ml of media from...
steps.instruction: Remove 1 ml of media from astrocytes, add 1 ml of media + puromycin. Final puromycin concentration is 1ug/mL.

steps.title: Add some AGM to a 50...
steps.instruction: Add some AGM to a 50 ml tube and add puromycin at 2ug/mL. Equilibrate media.

steps.title: Two days after addition of lentivirus,...
steps.instruction: Two days after addition of lentivirus, begin puromycin treatment (astrocytes are DIV10).

steps.title: Add 500 ul of lentivirus, and 1ug/mL polybrene
steps.instruction: Add 500 ul of lentivirus, and 1ug/mL polybrene. Optimize lentiviral titration to achieve desired transduction efficiency in astrocyte cultures.

steps.title: Plate rat primary astrocytes (at DIV7)...
steps.instruction: Plate rat primary astrocytes (at DIV7) in 6-well dishes at a density suitable for transduction experiments (300,000-400,000 cells/well). For details on the astrocyte isolation protocol, refer to the protocol below. Astrocyte Isolation and ACM Production by Justin T Savage

steps.title: Remove 500 ul of media from...
steps.instruction: Remove 500 ul of media from each well you wish to treat.

steps.title: After three days (astrocytes are DIV15,...
steps.instruction: After three days (astrocytes are DIV15, day 5 of puromycin treatment), lyse astrocytes.
